7. "you're so obsessed with this, i can't believe you're so focused on it."  
8. "i don't know what you're talking about, but i'm sure you're right."  
9. "you're so negative, i can't believe you're so cynical."  
10. "i'm not sure what you're saying, but i'm sure it's true."  

note: all lowercase words appear at most 2 times. the keyword "mark" is included in the 6th sentence as the 16th word.
